text:
Explanatory variable
                                           The social credit system construction is a comprehensive project aimed at improving the over-
                                           all credit level of society. It collects and evaluates the credit information of individuals and
                                           enterprises, establishes credit files, incentivizes trustworthy behavior, and penalizes dishonest
                                           behavior through the credit scoring system. The system was first implemented in some dem-
                                           onstration cities and demonstration zones and gradually extended to the whole country
                                           through the practice and exploration in these areas. The aim was to promote the improvement
                                           of the social credit system and the sound development of the economic order. The specific
                                           construction of the social credit system is shown in Table 1.
                                               According to the different times when the city where the enterprise is located enters the
                                           pilot reform of the social credit system, this study sets dummy variable TREAT to make a bet-
                                           ter causal judgment. If the city where the enterprise is located is included in the pilot reform of
                                           the social credit system, the value is 1; Otherwise, it is 0. Then, set the time dummy variable
